/home/runner/work/libvncserver/.codeql-scratch/dbs/cpp/working/autobuild/bin/cc -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/vncclient.dir/link.d -shared -Wl,-soname,libvncclient.so.1 -o libvncclient.so.0.9.15 CMakeFiles/vncclient.dir/src/libvncclient/cursor.c.o CMakeFiles/vncclient.dir/src/libvncclient/listen.c.o CMakeFiles/vncclient.dir/src/libvncclient/rfbclient.c.o CMakeFiles/vncclient.dir/src/libvncclient/sockets.c.o CMakeFiles/vncclient.dir/src/libvncclient/vncviewer.c.o CMakeFiles/vncclient.dir/src/common/sockets.c.o CMakeFiles/vncclient.dir/src/common/crypto_openssl.c.o CMakeFiles/vncclient.dir/src/libvncclient/tls_gnutls.c.o CMakeFiles/vncclient.dir/src/common/minilzo.c.o  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgnutls.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgnutls.so
